Schema.description: Module-level completion status derived from task records. One record per learner per module. Updated whenever a task record changes. Module-keyed — not course-keyed (shared-module reuse semantics per domain model #402).
Schema.condition: CloudFormation Condition: IsShadowStage (only provisioned when stage=shadow)

attributes.status: not_started | in_progress | complete — module-level computed status
attributes.task_statuses: Map: {<taskSlug>: {status, score?, attempts}} — per-task snapshot for fast My Learning reads
attributes.last_updated_at: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent status recomputation
attributes.completion_tasks_version: String hash or timestamp of completion.json at computation time — used to detect when task declarations change
